leadText: The Latiasite (Japanese: ラティアスナイト Latiasnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Latias to Mega Evolve into Mega Latias.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Latias , the Latiasite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Latias if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Latiasite from Latias. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Latias, the Latiasite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Latias when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Latias will remain a Mega Latias until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Latias , the Latiasite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Latias if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Latiasite from Latias.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Latias hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Latias hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Latias holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
